title: Extended producer responsibility for packaging: contact and support
body: "If you have questions about EPR for packaging, including whether you have to report packaging data, what data you have to report and how much you have to pay, contact the EPR for packaging helpdesk.  Contact the helpdesk  Telephone: 0300 060 0002  Email: EPRCustomerService@defra.gov.uk  If you were trying to view an invoice  You cannot yet view invoices using the ‘Report packaging data’ service.  Your primary contact will receive an email when your invoice is available to view.  If you have any questions, contact the helpdesk. "
